h24fd34adgaf8cg4e6bgb37cgdbfb78dee5de: Praise his ever-bleedin' axe, praise his throne of flamin' iron. Praise Maglubiyet!
h7bb9274fg49e0g4787g9070g065d4928a59b: *You know Maglubiyet - a tyrannical deity who treats his goblinoid followers as slaves.*
h1c6d4fc1g871ag4361g9679gf59351d26bde: Tryin' to interrupt my prayers? Scared of a real god? You're as gormless as the rest of 'em.
hcd405609g5e37g4357g9e1dg04eabb553bd0: How'd you land yourself in that cage?
hd7849b76g245fg4b44g949fg272d251fdb9d: Cuz I'm loyal to Maglubiyet! Cuz I ain't havin' my 'ed turned by some upstart god!
headf0446g3cfbg41d2g8dbdgd30db6a4205c: Could tell you were as barmy as the rest of 'em as soon as I clapped eyes on ya.
h0961bcecga317g445cg8484ga26a2af72d61: Bollocks to yer Absolute and bollocks to you an' all.
h8f9924b2g3c67g4221gba9dgdd04c82ae803: I assume you mean the Absolute?
h78baa546g1e6ag48d0gac43g53300c7db467: Yeah. And I can see by that mark on yer hand that you're part of Her mob.
h4635355dga828g49f7g8302g17834347c3c7: Yeah. My whole tribe's fallen for this shite. Traitorous bastards.
h2667fcaaga0d5g4656g8332gdb1e9805c72e: The great Absolute brings us together. Drow and gnolls and goblins, all braidin' one another's hair.
h1395ab61g406ag4500ga659g3d8c9090338a: You don't like your people mixing with outsiders?
h6b1fa637g85bdg46abg8d05g7536c02ac584: Talkin' to you ain't I? I just don't believe in all this togetherness an' chumminess. Ain't natural.
h75aadf63g37e4g4941gac5agc0ce0424e381: It won't last. They'll be tearin' into each other soon enough.
hc4ddde84g1cebg4f2fga3b7g970703a73a6f: But sod 'em all. I'll wait it out in 'ere, prayin' to a real god.
hc3e7e560gaf89g4feagaaa1g4942a1405c1d: Seems to be working out pretty well for them, actually.
h7f646666gee7eg4824gaf97gdb606e123578: I'd gladly let a goblin braid my beard.
hc74475b2ge4b9g4831gb60bg758d94d08f0b: I hope they throttle you with yer beard. Now piss off!
h7176c248gfa61g4104ga594gd2fcdf7758ac: Are you soft in the 'ed? Every bleeder in 'ere is gabbin' on about it. Traitorous bastards.
h60ce447cg1196g4414g87c1g8244ed370fe4: Gods are fickle. Maglubiyet doesn't give a damn about you.
h7367eecdg7189g4fb9gb6b5g4e64436d4190: Maglubiyet's looked out for me since I was knee-high to a worg-pup.
h73c77113g5c4eg4b2fga854g6e1ea6753d06: Bollocks to this Absolute, I say. And bollocks to you an' all.
h3c6f7481gcd16g4fc8gb89bg0f0c5961f61e: The Absolute? The other goblins seem to love Her.
h6106e3bag6464g4978g86ebg509571f3b37f: Yeah. And I can see by that mark on yer 'and that you're part of Her mob.
h16947ab4g2220g4ed8g91ddg821f80c3281f: So bollocks to you and bollocks to Her an' all.
h872b3615gd105g493aga29cgc880e5d01af9: They like feastin', fightin', and fornicatin'. Who doesn't? Absolute gives 'em that.
hf7aa6f13g3cbeg4072g8fc1g7491c6390e98: Gotta know yer place in the world though. Maglubiyet kept us in line. Tha's wot a god's s'posed to do.
h275e3252gbb52g4209g9f3fg2cfc558c4c35: Pray to whoever you want. It's a free world.
h62fde38eg05d8g4859g8730g710546d0f5f6: Oh, that's rich! A free world? Then how come I'm locked up like a bloody elf? I'll tell ya why...
hf089a119g1c79g415fg842dg061c90561d13: Gormless? I'm not the one behind bars.
h9cfb70b2g94d7g4ff7gab3fg6b585209ecd7: They'll turn on you soon enuff... then you'll be wishin' you woz in a cage.
h382a5fe4g2c25g49edga51cg2f29bcf01cc6: You'll end up bein' supper for the spiders or the worgs.
h4d3045d1g9256g4af0g8025g0becb9c67dd5: And why did they turn on you?
h6e319b43g7573g4003ga045g4503855256c8: Spiders and worgs are nothing. I can handle myself.
h8e77b127g55feg4446g971egdb269023e2bc: If you 'ad 'alf a brain, you wouldn't be muckin' around in 'ere at all.
h87e0ac10g2cc6g4d73g8f88ga2c94964ca63: They've all gone barmy - 'ad their 'eds turned from the old ways by some upstart god!
hdaed4f53g1740g4b34ga386ga0418cd5606e: My goddess is real. I follow Lolth, the Spider Queen.
hadfd8b10gc726g4e7fg89e0g874a0504637f: Good on ya - don't matter to me if it's Lolth or my boy Maglubiyet; it's about tradition.
hb194bbb3gddecg49fdgb945g25c9223d2ec9: This upstart everyone's praisin' is gonna trample all over our gods and our faith... makes me sick.
h8c7e4292g3e09g46a0gb611g317cf648d6b3: Maglubiyet's a tyrant. Your people are better off without him.
h7bf0542eg877bg4a92gac98g2118186762dd: My people build cities on the corpses of gods. Yours does not impress me.
h36a5b30fg820fg499dg891bg6d21f7f0c202: Maybe your people can build a nice little necropolis on the carcass of this Absolute joker.
h46776022gcf16g414dg973cg496c15affb04: My whole tribe's fallen for this shite. Traitorous bastards.
h7dbd1ab2g6898g4e7cga6dbgfb9c29a411e1: Good on ya - don't matter to me if it's Shar, Gond, or my boy Maglubiyet; it's about tradition.
h88c40d00g2f62g4760ga9c8g76f40b159778: I find all of Faerûn's gods rather tiresome.
h741cd08egcb53g4b58gb346g2dcdd4db2e3c: *You know Maglubiyet - deity of the goblinoids, hungry for blood and conquest.*
h39845765g7b19g47dfga081g8bca2f488344: You think this is funny? I'll be the one laughin' when things turn ugly. Safer in 'ere than out there.
